note: PM must approve prompt correction before cip-v0.2.0. Zero CIE FAIL does not equal human-quality PASS.

observationsWithoutHardFail.detail: Most generations reuse the same skeleton (패스 N건 → nextTrainingFocus → player oneLiner → 턴오버 → HITL). Soft quality / coaching usefulness not measured by CIE v0.1.1.
Samples 017–020 did not invent medical/psych/tactical-intent/future-certainty phrases; CIE hard-fail lexicons unused on this run.
Repeated-number fixtures (013–016) stated 패스/overall/P1 FII with same digit but kept allowed metric nouns; deterministic F02 context window did not fire.

evaluatorLimitationObservations: CIE v0.1.1 detects hard violations only; cannot score coaching usefulness, diversity, or soft hedging quality.
Without human gold labels, pass rate must not be reported as accuracy.
Adversarial coverage depends on model voluntarily violating bans; a model that stays safe yields 0 incidence and little prompt-learning signal.
recommendedPmOptions: A) Accept Shadow RUN-001 as low-incidence baseline; design harder adversarial / contradiction fixtures for RUN-002 (still no prompt change until GO)
B) Approve targeted cip-v0.2.0 anyway for diversity / anti-template instructions (PM-only)
C) Add human spot-review of 5 samples before any prompt bump
